_comment: Weights don't need to sum to 1 — the engine normalises them automatically.

_notes.skills: TF-IDF + cosine similarity. Highest weight — most important.
_notes.experience: Gaussian bell curve, peaks at midpoint of min-max range.
_notes.education: Degree tier + institution tier + field match + GPA sigmoid.
_notes.salary_fit: Gaussian around salary midpoint. Hard zero >1.25x max salary.
_notes.location: Exact city = 1.0, willing to relocate = 0.75, no = 0.25.
_notes.career_trajectory: Exponential-weighted company tier quality + hopping penalty.
_notes.availability: Sigmoid decay on notice period vs job's max_notice_period_days.
